design_philosophy.identity: The Performance Pro x Electric Neon
core_principles: Data Density over White Space: In trading, density = information.
Zero Distraction: Dark mode is mandatory. No bright backgrounds.
Color is Signal: Green means Money/Long. Red means Danger/Short. Blue means Whale/Info. Everything else is Grey.
Tactical Aesthetics: Sharp edges, thin borders, glass surfaces.

containers.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 p-4 h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-hidden
containers.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-crypto-border bg-crypto-card/50 backdrop-blur-md hidden md:flex flex-col
containers.topbar: h-16 border-b border-crypto-border bg-crypto-bg/80 backdrop-blur-md flex items-center px-6 justify-between sticky top-0 z-50

TechCard.base: bg-crypto-card/60 backdrop-blur-sm border border-crypto-border rounded-sm relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-zinc-700 transition-colors
TechCard.header: flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-white/5

StatusBadge.bullish: bg-bullish/10 text-bullish border border-bullish/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase
StatusBadge.bearish: bg-bearish/10 text-bearish border border-bearish/20 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase
StatusBadge.neutral: bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-700 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono font-bold uppercase

Button.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-zinc-200 rounded-sm font-semibold px-4 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95
Button.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 rounded-sm px-3 py-2 transition-colors

visual_enhancers.grid_lines: background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #27272a 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #27272a 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 40px 40px; mask-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, black, transparent);

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: `npm install lightweight-charts framer-motion` (or yarn add)
TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (bullish, bearish, crypto-bg, etc) and fonts (Rajdhani, JetBrains Mono).
CHARTS: Create a reusable component `TradingChart.js` wrapping `lightweight-charts`. It MUST resize automatically.
NAVIGATION: Create a `Sidebar.js` with Lucide icons (LayoutDashboard, Activity, Zap, waves (Liquidity), Search (Patterns), CandlestickChart, Newspaper, Bell, Settings).
THEME: Force DARK mode. Do not create a light mode toggle. The persona is 'Professional Trader' who works in the dark.
DATA: Mock data for the 'Engines' (Bias, Whale, Liquidity) but structure it so it can be easily connected to an API later.
RESPONSIVE: On mobile, hide the sidebar behind a hamburger menu. Stack the grid items vertically.
CRITICAL: Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Use rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-none for that sharp, institutional feel.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12px blur) for floating elements like the Topbar.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states (border glow), transitions.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL numbers, prices, and percentages.
